hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams escalate and manage high-risk sanctions exposure by linking wallet risks, transaction signals and regulatory alerts into audit-ready workflows.

problem_title: Sanctions exposure creates compliance blind spots
problem_description: High-risk sanctions flags often remain isolated across multiple monitoring tools, making escalation workflows slow and inconsistent. Compliance teams struggle to link wallet risk, transaction activity, and sanctions alerts into a single, auditable case for timely action.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet and transaction sanctions alerts, provider risk outputs, and compliance workflows into unified cases with audit-ready evidence to accelerate escalation and support timely team decisions.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to sanctions case review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals and sanctions alerts, routes them through review and case workflows, and preserves evidence for compliance decisions and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One sanctions control
why_sfty_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals into structured cases, decisions and audit evidence for clearer sanctions exposure management and compliance workflow control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with controlled provider orchestration, audit-quality evidence preservation and deployment governance for defensible sanctions review workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for sanctions exposure monitoring?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet screening, transaction risk and sanctions alerts into structured cases and workflows, helping compliance teams manage high-risk sanctions exposure efficiently across customers and transactions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle sanctions risk alerts?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates sanctions alerts from multiple providers, applies internal risk rules, routes cases for review and links evidence to support compliance investigations and escalation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence in an audit-ready format to maintain traceability and support regulatory or internal compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYT and sanctions tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY layers above existing KYT, wallet screening and sanctions providers, integrating their outputs into one operational compliance workflow without replacing current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current sanctions providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace sanctions or KYT providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, supporting consistent decisions and audit evidence across the compliance stack.
final_title: Connect sanctions exposure to compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY links wallet sanctions, transaction risks and provider alerts into structured cases and audit-ready evidence.
